title: besleria neblinae
intro: Besleria neblinae is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the cloud forest besleria. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Besleria neblinae include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Besleria neblinae is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
